text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... I really did it this time, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Still, the doctor back there was making way too much of a fuss! It's not that bad!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll be back to training in no time! A little bump
like this would never affect a lady li—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ow!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah... An adult would never admit that they're
in pain—even if they really are.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That's why I'll never tell you if I'm hurting!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm not some... lame-o kid!
choice_data_list: Okay then, we'll handle this like adults.
It isn't lame to admit that you're in pain.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Like adults? You mean calmly?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Right... I guess adults are pretty calm.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...I got it! I'm not really in any pain, but I'll be a
responsible adult and rest as much as I can.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Even though it doesn't hurt... Not even a little...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mayano Top Gun is able to get some
rest.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But Trainer...
choice_data_list:
The lamest thing you could do is aggravate your
injury by pushing yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: True! I guess you're right!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...B-but I really am fine! It only hurts a tiny bit. I
don't think it'll get worse—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Urk! Owww!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun pretends to be okay, but it
ends up costing her. Her injury worsens, and she's
forced to rest for a few days...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Um, it actually kinda hurts. My injury, that is.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But I don't wanna stop training with you!
choice_data_list: We can train again after you get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Roger that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It takes some time for her injury to heal, but she
eventually returns to her normal schedule.
